{"5e88101a-9a9a-45dc-932b-b15b680d567b":{"id":"5e88101a-9a9a-45dc-932b-b15b680d567b","name":"[TextContent(type=text, text=
<additional_data>
Below are some potentially helpful/relevant pieces of information for figuring out to respond
<current_file>
```kotlin:app/src/main/java/com/example/kidcreds/data/datastore/KidCredsPrefDatastore.kt, lines=ALL(1-28)
package com.example.kidcreds.data.datastore

import android.content.Context
import androidx.datastore.core.DataStore
import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.Preferences
import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.booleanPreferencesKey
import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.edit
import androidx.datastore.preferences.preferencesDataStore
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
import javax.inject.Inject

val key_login = booleanPreferencesKey("login")
private val Context.dataStore: DataStore<Preferences> by preferencesDataStore(name = "log_in")

class KidCredsPrefDatastore @Inject constructor(private val dataStore: DataStore<Preferences>) {
 suspend fun saveLoginStatus(isLoggedIn: Boolean) {
 dataStore.edit { preferences ->
 preferences[key_login] = isLoggedIn
 }
 }

 fun getLoginStatus(): Flow<Boolean> {
 return dataStore.data.map { preferences ->
 preferences[key_login] ?: false
 }
 }
}
```
</current_file>
</additional_data>
<user_query>
what is wrong here
</user_query>)]","timestamp":1777135536171,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"

<current_file>
```kotlin:app/src/main/java/com/example/kidcreds/data/datastore/KidCredsPrefDatastore.kt, lines=ALL(1-28)
package com.example.kidcreds.data.datastore

import android.content.Context
import androidx.datastore.core.DataStore
import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.Preferences
import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.booleanPreferencesKey
import androidx.datastore.preferences.core.edit
import androidx.datastore.preferences.preferencesDataStore
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
import javax.inject.Inject

val key_login = booleanPreferencesKey("login")
private val Context.dataStore: DataStore<Preferences> by preferencesDataStore(name = "log_in")

class KidCredsPrefDatastore @Inject constructor(private val dataStore: DataStore<Preferences>) {
 suspend fun saveLoginStatus(isLoggedIn: Boolean) {
 dataStore.edit { preferences ->
 preferences[key_login] = isLoggedIn
 }
 }

 fun getLoginStatus(): Flow<Boolean> {
 return dataStore.data.map { preferences ->
 preferences[key_login] ?: false
 }
 }
}
```
